title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
